no: Neh'taniel:0;Neh'taniel - Neh'taniel NPC Mod after Beyond the Law Sheena unlike Tyris, apparently bad fanservice AT_INTERACTIVE_EXIT patched to prevent readme popup during automated install.
sum: Adds Sheena, a neutral good half-dragon Fighter/Wizard companion recruitable from Firkraag's lair, featuring extensive NPC banters and a friendship/romance path.

co.no: AT_INTERACTIVE_EXIT patched to prevent readme popup during automated install.
